title: Steve Rosenberg: This year's Victory Day parade in Moscow felt very different
summary_full: The BBC's Russia editor reports from a Red Square with none of the military hardware which the Kremlin normally showcases to project power internationally.
summary_public: The BBC's Russia editor reports from a Red Square with none of the military hardware which the Kremlin normally showcases to project power internationally.
